## UI preview

<!-- If this PR changes client UI (`client/src`, `index.html`, `public`): -->

1. Run `cd client && npm run ui:preview` and commit `.github/ui-preview/`
2. Paste the block from `cd client && npm run ui:embed` below

**Do not** use `![...](.github/ui-preview/app-shell.png)` — that path is broken in PR descriptions. The embed script uses `raw.githubusercontent.com`.

```markdown
(paste output of npm run ui:embed here)
```
